hero.title: 무료 금융 계산기
hero.subtitle: 대출, 주택담보대출, 투자, 은퇴, 세금 등을 위한 124개의 전문가급 계산기. 빠르고 정확하며 100% 무료입니다.

features.calculatorsDesc: 대출, 주택담보대출, 투자, 은퇴, 세금 및 개인 재정을 위한 포괄적인 계산기 — 모두 한 곳에.
features.aiDesc: 간단한 언어로 필요한 것을 설명하면 즉시 맞춤형 편집 가능 계산기가 생성됩니다.
features.dashboardDesc: 맞춤 계산기와 재정 계획을 저장하여 언제든지 개인 대시보드에서 액세스하세요.
features.languagesDesc: QFINHUB를 영어, 스페인어 또는 힌디어로 사용하세요. 자동 언어 감지 기능이 있습니다.
features.widgetsDesc: 결과를 이미지나 PDF로 공유하세요. 모든 계산기를 자신의 웹사이트에 임베드할 수 있습니다.
features.designDesc: 가볍고 반응형 디자인으로 모바일, 태블릿, 데스크톱 등 모든 기기에서 완벽하게 작동합니다.

homepage.sectionTitle: 하나의 도구 상자에 필요한 모든 것
homepage.ctaDesc: 가입이 필요하지 않습니다. 즉시 모든 계산기를 사용하기 시작하거나 계정을 만들어 결과를 저장하세요.
homepage.trusted: 전 세계 수천 명의 사용자가 신뢰함

aiSpecialist.title: AI Custom Specialist
aiSpecialist.subtitle: Describe what you need in plain language
aiSpecialist.placeholder: e.g., Calculate my monthly mortgage payment...
aiSpecialist.greeting: What financial calculator would you like to build?
examples: Calculate my retirement savings with 7% growth over 30 years
Create a loan amortization schedule for a $50,000 car loan
Compare renting vs buying a $400,000 home
Calculate compound interest with monthly contributions
aiSpecialist.askMe: Ask me to build any financial calculator
aiSpecialist.featuresDesc: Describe the financial calculator you need, and I'll build it instantly — complete with inputs, results, charts, and a personalized financial plan.
aiSpecialist.featureCalcDesc: AI builds any calculator you describe

chat.title: AI Financial Specialist
chat.description: Ask me to build any financial calculator. Try asking about compound interest, loan payments, retirement planning, or investment returns.
chat.placeholder: Ask me to build a financial calculator...
examples: Build a compound interest calculator with monthly contributions
Create a loan payment calculator with amortization table
Build a retirement planning calculator with withdrawal strategy
Create an investment return calculator with CAGR

share.shareDesc: Share {title} with others or export the results.
share.exportDesc: Export the calculator results as an image or PDF document.

dynamicCalc.inputsDesc: Adjust values to recalculate in real-time

calcLayout.inputsDesc: Adjust the values below to calculate your results
calcLayout.resultsDesc: Your calculated results based on the inputs provided

dashboard.welcomeBack: Welcome back to QFINHUB. Here's your financial overview.
dashboard.recentPlansDesc: Your most recently saved AI-generated calculators
dashboard.searchPlans: Search plans by title or description...
dashboard.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete
dashboard.settingsDesc: Manage your profile, preferences, and account settings
dashboard.deleteAccountDesc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data
deleteConfirmList: All your saved plans and calculator data will be erased.
You will lose access to your dashboard and saved results.
Your email and account credentials will be removed from our system.
You will not be able to recover your data or log in again.
dashboard.deleteConfirmPrompt: Are you sure you want to proceed?
dashboard.signInRequiredDesc: Please sign in to access your settings.

calcList.title: Financial Calculators
calcList.noResultsDesc: Try adjusting your search or filter to find what you're looking for.
calcList.calcCount: {count} professional financial calculators across {categories} categories. Browse, calculate, and export your results.

footer.brandDesc: Free, fast, and professional-grade financial calculators for loans, mortgages, investments, retirement, taxes, and personal finance.
